content: {"perspective": "Scientific", "question": "Across the most rigorous independent systematic reviews and meta-analyses of randomized controlled trials published 2023-2025, what are the pooled point estimates (SMD/WMD with 95% confidence intervals) for the effects of intermittent fasting on fasting blood sugar, HbA1c, HOMA-IR, LDL-C, and IL-6 in adults with metabolic syndrome, and what GRADE certainty ratings have been assigned to each endpoint?", "search_queries": ["intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome systematic review meta-analysis HOMA-IR HbA1c 2024 2025 GRADE", "\"standardized mean difference\" fasting blood sugar intermittent fasting meta-analysis 95% confidence interval", "GRADE certainty rating intermittent fasting LDL cholesterol IL-6 meta-analysis metabolic", "PROSPERO CRD420251142741 intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome PRISMA review", "Lancet eClinicalMedicine umbrella review intermittent fasting health outcomes meta-analysis"]}
